intent.summary: Restructure an existing Claude Code skill for token efficiency, reliability, and triggering accuracy via five lossless operations.
intent.primary_user: agent invoked on an existing skill directory

altitude_rationale: Mature, widely-reused meta-skill with a wide surface (5 operations, 9 rules modules); warrants full rigor.

scorecard.evidence: Frontmatter has explicit Use-when + Do-NOT triggers; body is a numbered runbook with a Modules table.
Pattern libraries (encapsulation/hardening) exist but are authored, not sourced to external evidence.
gaps: no provenance for the pattern catalogues

scorecard.evidence: diff_lossless.py + measure_tokens.py give deterministic verification; evals/ present.
Verification scripts exist but tests are not written before edits.
No defined success rate or activation precision for the restructuring outcome.
gaps: define before/after token delta as a tracked metric

scorecard.evidence: SKILL.md is a thin orchestrator; 9 rules files loaded on demand.
No version, changelog, or deprecation path in the skill.

overall_readiness.summary: Strong design and low-context structure with deterministic verification; held back from industrial by missing metrics and lifecycle.

comparables.what_to_borrow: per-step verification gates and an anti-rationalization table to harden instructions

recommended_design.trigger: Keep the existing Use-when/Do-NOT description; add 2 adjacent false-trigger cases vs skill-creator and vince-skill-engineer.
recommended_design.protocol: Keep the 5-step runbook; add a metrics-capture step after verification.
recommended_design.evidence_base: Cite sources for the encapsulation/hardening pattern catalogues, or mark them as authored heuristics with a rationale.
tests: add a regression case for a known under-trigger
metrics: triggering accuracy on a held-out eval set
recommended_design.lifecycle: Add a version field + changelog; define when a restructure is breaking.
adversarial_checklist: a skill whose SKILL.md is a single >150-line block (compress must fire)
a skill with an empty description (retrigger must not crash)
a skill already minimal (must propose no lossy change — idempotency)
a Harden rewrite that changes intent (diff_lossless must flag it)

prioritized_actions.action: Define and record before/after always-loaded token delta and a held-out triggering-accuracy score.
prioritized_actions.rationale: Metrics absent caps the verdict at candidate.

prioritized_actions.action: Add a version + changelog and a breaking-change rule.
prioritized_actions.rationale: Enables safe evolution of a widely reused skill.

prioritized_actions.action: Add provenance to the pattern catalogues or mark them authored heuristics.

blocking_unknowns: Is a triggering-accuracy eval set already maintained elsewhere, or must the engineer build one?
